title: Novel bispecific anti-ctla-4/pd-1 polypeptide complexes
abstract: The present disclosure provides bispecific anti-CTLA-4 x PD-1 polypeptide complexes that contain antibody variable regions fused to the TCR constant regions, methods of producing the bispecific anti-CTLA-4 x PD-1polypeptide complexes, methods of treating diseases or conditions using the bispecific anti-CTLA-4 x PD-1 polypeptide complexes, host cells expressing the bispecific anti-CTLA-4 x PD-1 polypeptide complexes, and compositions and pharmaceutical compositions comprising the bispecific anti-CTLA-4 x PD-1 polypeptide complexes.
claims: Claims ( 33 ) AĂ‚Â bispecificĂ‚Â polypeptideĂ‚Â complex,Ă‚Â comprisingĂ‚Â aĂ‚Â firstĂ‚Â antigen-bindingĂ‚Â moietyĂ‚Â associatedĂ‚Â withĂ‚Â aĂ‚Â secondĂ‚Â antigen-bindingĂ‚Â moiety,Ă‚Â wherein: theĂ‚Â firstĂ‚Â antigen-bindingĂ‚Â moietyĂ‚Â comprises: aĂ‚Â firstĂ‚Â heavyĂ‚Â chainĂ‚Â variableĂ‚Â domainĂ‚Â (VH)Ă‚Â ofĂ‚Â aĂ‚Â firstĂ‚Â antibodyĂ‚Â operablyĂ‚Â linkedĂ‚Â toĂ‚Â aĂ‚Â firstĂ‚Â TĂ‚Â cellĂ‚Â receptorĂ‚Â (TCR)Ă‚Â constantĂ‚Â regionĂ‚Â (C1)Ă‚Â ,Ă‚Â andĂ‚Â aĂ‚Â firstĂ‚Â lightĂ‚Â chainĂ‚Â variableĂ‚Â domainĂ‚Â (VL)Ă‚Â ofĂ‚Â theĂ‚Â firstĂ‚Â antibodyĂ‚Â operablyĂ‚Â linkedĂ‚Â toĂ‚Â aĂ‚Â secondĂ‚Â TCRĂ‚Â constantĂ‚Â regionĂ‚Â (C2)Ă‚Â ,Ă‚Â and theĂ‚Â secondĂ‚Â antigen-bindingĂ‚Â moietyĂ‚Â comprises: aĂ‚Â secondĂ‚Â VHĂ‚Â ofĂ‚Â aĂ‚Â secondĂ‚Â antibodyĂ‚Â operablyĂ‚Â linkedĂ‚Â toĂ‚Â anĂ‚Â antibodyĂ‚Â heavyĂ‚Â chainĂ‚Â CH1Ă‚Â domain,Ă‚Â andĂ‚Â aĂ‚Â secondĂ‚Â VLĂ‚Â ofĂ‚Â theĂ‚Â secondĂ‚Â antibodyĂ‚Â operablyĂ‚Â linkedĂ‚Â toĂ‚Â anĂ‚Â antibodyĂ‚Â lightĂ‚Â chainĂ‚Â constantĂ‚Â (CL)Ă‚Â domain, wherein:Ă‚Â (a)Ă‚Â oneĂ‚Â ofĂ‚Â theĂ‚Â firstĂ‚Â andĂ‚Â theĂ‚Â secondĂ‚Â antigen-bindingĂ‚Â moietyĂ‚Â isĂ‚Â anĂ‚Â anti-CTLA-4Ă‚Â bindingĂ‚Â moiety,Ă‚Â andĂ‚Â theĂ‚Â otherĂ‚Â oneĂ‚Â isĂ‚Â anĂ‚Â anti-PD-1Ă‚Â bindingĂ‚Â moiety, (b)Ă‚Â theĂ‚Â anti-CTLA-4Ă‚Â bindingĂ‚Â moietyĂ‚Â isĂ‚Â derivedĂ‚Â fromĂ‚Â anĂ‚Â anti-CTLA-4Ă‚Â antibodyĂ‚Â comprising: (i)Ă‚Â aĂ‚Â aĂ‚Â heavyĂ‚Â chainĂ‚Â complementarityĂ‚Â determiningĂ‚Â regionĂ‚Â (CDRH)Ă‚Â 1Ă‚Â consistingĂ‚Â ofĂ‚Â SEQĂ‚Â IDĂ‚Â NO:Ă‚Â 5,Ă‚Â aĂ‚Â CDRH2Ă‚Â consistingĂ‚Â ofĂ‚Â SEQĂ‚Â IDĂ‚Â NO:Ă‚Â 6,Ă‚Â aĂ‚Â CDRH3Ă‚Â consistingĂ‚Â ofĂ‚Â SEQĂ‚Â IDĂ‚Â NO:Ă‚Â 7,Ă‚Â aĂ‚Â lightĂ‚Â chainĂ‚Â complementarityĂ‚Â determiningĂ‚Â regionĂ‚Â (CDRL)Ă‚Â 1Ă‚Â consistingĂ‚Â ofĂ‚Â SEQĂ‚Â IDĂ‚Â NO:Ă‚Â 8,Ă‚Â aĂ‚Â CDRL2Ă‚Â consistingĂ‚Â ofĂ‚Â SEQĂ‚Â IDĂ‚Â NO:Ă‚Â 9,Ă‚Â andĂ‚Â aĂ‚Â CDRL3Ă‚Â consistingĂ‚Â ofĂ‚Â SEQĂ‚Â IDĂ‚Â NO:Ă‚Â 10;
